description: Evidence-updated Stage 1 frontier family for A100 ranking and later 8xH100 promotion.

slots.name: baseline
slots.why: Pure baseline comparator for the public-frontier family.

slots.name: m02_seq2048_train
slots.why: Public evidence says longer training context is real; this is the cleanest first geometry scout.

slots.name: m09_fp16_embed_export
slots.why: Test whether selective fp16 export on the tied embedding pays back immediately.

slots.name: m06_adamw_partition
slots.why: Public top records validate AdamW on embedding/scalar groups with Muon left on matrices.

slots.name: m11_sliding_eval64
slots.why: Directly test sliding-window evaluation with minimal training changes.

slots.name: m08_always_decay
slots.why: Test the public always-decaying schedule direction as its own family recipe.

slots.name: m01_depth10_width480
slots.why: Keep one architecture reallocation family alive while the public frontier is ranked.

slots.name: m07_adaptive_muon
slots.why: Keep our best Muon timing family available while optimizer partitioning is ranked.
